category_sources: source_facts.description says FFTW provides C routines to compute the Discrete Fourier Transform.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fftw; official homepage uses FFTW as the project name.
docs_sources: Official FFTW homepage links to HTML documentation/manual; /doc/ is the official manual surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched; official FFTW download page links the current snapshot of FFTW at GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Discrete Fourier Transform routines.
source_facts.homepage is the official FFTW site describing FFTW as a C subroutine library.
